results.name: Cisco AI Defense skill-scanner
results.install_hint: pip install cisco-ai-skill-scanner   # then: skill-scanner scan <path> --format json
results.notes: Signature + optional LLM semantic + behavioural dataflow. 'No findings != no risk.'

findings.title: Outbound network request primitives that can transmit data externally

results.name: NVIDIA SkillSpector
results.install_hint: git clone https://github.com/NVIDIA/SkillSpector && cd SkillSpector && uv venv && make install
results.notes: 64 patterns / 16 categories incl. prompt injection, exfiltration, MCP tool poisoning. Risk score 0-100. (run with --no-llm; pass --enhanced for LLM analysis)

results.name: Snyk Agent Scan
results.install_hint: uvx snyk-agent-scan@latest <path> --json   # needs SNYK_TOKEN; pass --allow-uvx to fetch & run
results.notes: Auto-discovers skills/MCP across agents. Requires SNYK_TOKEN.
results.skip_reason: SNYK_TOKEN not set - export it to enable Snyk

results.name: sentry/skill-scanner (community)
results.notes: Install-time scanner; bundled scan_skill.py runs static analysis. Looked under: C:\Users\jochi\.agents\skills, C:\Users\jochi\.claude\skills
